## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] Maintenance (`chore`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `node tests/run-tests.js` — ALL GREEN
- [ ] Lint passes: `node tests/lint-all.js`
- [ ] No external dependencies added
- [ ] Cross-platform tested (or paths use `path.join()`)
- [ ] README/SKILL.md updated if adding commands or hooks
